message:
fix(test): add missing config field in safety gates integration test

Updates the session safety integration test to include the newly added
block_if_open_write_fds field in LivePreCheckConfig.

The test was missing this field after the config struct was expanded
to support fine-grained control over write FD blocking. Setting it to
false allows the test to focus on session-level safety checks without
interference from the write FD gate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
